Initializes a debounced button in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This is a C header file that declares a function prototype for [`debounced_button_init`](<#debounced_button_init>). The function is intended to initialize a debounced button, which is a common technique used to ensure that only a single signal is registered when a button is pressed, despite any noise or bouncing that may occur. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the header file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. The file includes a copyright notice and licensing information under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
